mapper.select: SELECT id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_definition ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_definition WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_definition WHERE work_item_type = #{workItemType}

SELECT id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_definition WHERE status = 'ENABLED' AND is_default = 1 ORDER BY CASE WHEN work_item_type = 'FE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, workflow_definition_id, node_key, name, order_no, skill_name, input_policy, output_artifact_type, output_name_template, retry_limit, timeout_seconds, required_confirmation, stage_key, stage_goal, recommended_skill_names_json, allow_dynamic_actions, confirmation_policy FROM workflow_node_definition WHERE workflow_definition_id = #{workflowDefinitionId} ORDER BY order_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_definition (id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default) VALUES (#{id}, #{workItemType}, #{name}, #{versionNo}, #{status}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_definition SET name = #{name}, version_no = #{versionNo}, status = #{status}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE workflow_definition SET is_default = 0, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE work_item_type = #{workItemType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_node_definition ( id, workflow_definition_id, node_key, name, order_no, skill_name, input_policy, output_artifact_type, output_name_template, retry_limit, timeout_seconds, required_confirmation, stage_key, stage_goal, recommended_skill_names_json, allow_dynamic_actions, confirmation_policy ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{workflowDefinitionId}, #{nodeKey}, #{name}, #{orderNo}, #{skillName}, #{inputPolicy}, #{outputArtifactType}, #{outputNameTemplate}, #{retryLimit}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{requiredConfirmation}, #{stageKey}, #{stageGoal}, #{recommendedSkillNamesJson}, COALESCE(#{allowDynamicActions}, 1), #{confirmationPolicy} )
mapper.select: SELECT wni.id, wni.workflow_instance_id, wni.node_definition_id, wni.status, wni.input_artifact_id, wni.output_artifact_id, wni.agent_session_id, wni.runtime_session_id, wni.started_at, wni.completed_at, wni.error_message, wni.version, wni.node_kind, wni.origin, wni.parent_node_instance_id, wni.stage_key, wni.skill_name, wni.summary, wni.reason, wni.sequence_no FROM workflow_node_instance wni JOIN workflow_node_definition wnd ON wni.node_definition_id = wnd.id WHERE wni.workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId} ORDER BY wnd.order_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_instance (id, work_item_id, workflow_definition_id, status, current_node_instance_id, started_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowDefinitionId}, #{status}, #{currentNodeInstanceId}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_instance SET status = #{status}, current_node_instance_id = #{currentNodeInstanceId}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_node_instance (id, workflow_instance_id, node_definition_id, status, input_artifact_id, output_artifact_id, agent_session_id, runtime_session_id, started_at, completed_at, error_message, version, node_kind, origin, parent_node_instance_id, stage_key, skill_name, summary, reason, sequence_no) VALUES (#{id}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{nodeDefinitionId}, #{status}, #{inputArtifactId}, #{outputArtifactId}, #{agentSessionId}, #{runtimeSessionId}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{errorMessage}, #{version}, COALESCE(#{nodeKind}, 'STAGE'), COALESCE(#{origin}, 'DEFINITION'), #{parentNodeInstanceId}, #{stageKey}, #{skillName}, #{summary}, #{reason}, #{sequenceNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_node_instance SET status = #{status}, output_artifact_id = #{outputArtifactId}, agent_session_id = #{agentSessionId}, runtime_session_id = #{runtimeSessionId}, started_at = #{startedAt}, input_artifact_id = #{inputArtifactId}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, node_kind = COALESCE(#{nodeKind}, node_kind), origin = COALESCE(#{origin}, origin), parent_node_instance_id = #{parentNodeInstanceId}, stage_key = #{stageKey}, skill_name = #{skillName}, summary = #{summary}, reason = #{reason}, sequence_no = #{sequenceNo}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, workflow_instance_id, node_definition_id, status, input_artifact_id, output_artifact_id, agent_session_id, runtime_session_id, started_at, completed_at, error_message, version, node_kind, origin, parent_node_instance_id, stage_key, skill_name, summary, reason, sequence_no FROM workflow_node_instance WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, work_item_id, workflow_definition_id, status, current_node_instance_id, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_instance WHERE work_item_id = #{workItemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_node_definition WHERE skill_name = #{skillName}
